# OpenRAM Generated Files

The OpenRAM compiler generated the following implementation files.

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| GDS | Physical layout of the SRAM macro |
| LEF | Abstract layout for Place & Route |
| Liberty (.lib) | Timing and characterization data |
| Verilog | Behavioral memory model |
| SPICE | Transistor-level circuit netlist |
| LVS SPICE | Netlist used for layout-versus-schematic verification |

These files are located under the repository:

results/
├── gds/
├── lef/
├── lib/
├── spice/
└── verilog/
